summary: Created internal/api/handlers/admin/tls.go with TLSHandler exposing Get/Put/PublicIP/CheckDNS backed by config.LoadHTTPSConfig/SaveHTTPSConfig and network.PublicIP. Registered /api/admin/tls-config routes in internal/api/router.go. Added internal/api/tls_test.go with 5 tests covering defaults, save/round-trip, validation, public IP env override, and DNS match. Verification: go test ./internal/api -run TestTLS -v passes (5/5), full internal/api package tests pass, and go vet is clean.
